questionHtml: Using a demand and supply diagram, explain how government subsidies may help to keep food prices low (Text E, paragraph 4).
markschemeHtml:
Candidates who label diagrams incorrectly can be awarded a maximum of [3].

The use of P and Q on the axes is sufficient for a demand and supply diagram. A title is not necessary.

meta.title: Using a demand and supply diagram, explain how government subsidies may help to keep food prices low (Text E, paragraph 4).
